tweets.text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

Visible escorts happening under US protection. There were 4 VLCCs that went in with AIS on. 

On the Iranian side, inbound tankers remain limited ex-Iran.

So far, no escalation has occurred from IRGC. I was wrong to assume that the $6 billion had already been returned to the Iranians. 

I guess time will tell what's really going on. 

Video from @MarineTraffic and I have included the table of inbound tankers below. VLCCs not related to Iran are highlighted.
tweets.full_text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

Visible escorts happening under US protection. There were 4 VLCCs that went in with AIS on. 

On the Iranian side, inbound tankers remain limited ex-Iran.

So far, no escalation has occurred from IRGC. I was wrong to assume that the $6 billion had already been returned to the Iranians. 

I guess time will tell what's really going on. 

Video from @MarineTraffic and I have included the table of inbound tankers below. VLCCs not related to Iran are highlighted.

tweets.text:
I’m looking to do another video with @Wordsofrizdom. 

We are organising a 15 v 1 in Miami on the 28th July. 

If you want to get FREE in person guidance/feedback from me over the topics that you struggle with most this is your chance. 

Make sure that you can be in Miami on the 28th July, fill out the form in DETAIL (if you don’t you won’t receive any response), be open and transparent about where you struggle most within your trading and be comfortable to be on camera.

Those who full out correctly will be contacted by a team member on Riz’s team for a zoom call to discuss in more detail and if selected you will be informed directly. 

Looking forward to meeting some of you then!

https://t.co/xEZW57bPbc

thread_tweets.text: @inhuman Just a big mega fan in general compared to other forms
thread_tweets.full_text: @inhuman Just a big mega fan in general compared to other forms

thread_tweets.text:
I think coming from scarlet and violet I was sick of terra shit, and didn’t love dynamax in SwSh, whereas megas were something I liked from older generations and it’s nice to see them add to them rather than make another new type of change 

I like how Megas work in VGC too, more fun to watch than Terra/dmax/gmax imo 

Aesthetically some of my favs are alakazam, Gengar, ampharos, hounddoom, Malamar, rayquaza

@inhuman Just a big mega fan in general compared to other forms

I think coming from scarlet and violet I was sick of terra shit, and didn’t love dynamax in SwSh, whereas megas were something I liked from older generations and it’s nice to see them add to them rather than make another new type of change 

I like how Megas work in VGC too, more fun to watch than Terra/dmax/gmax imo 

Aesthetically some of my favs are alakazam, Gengar, ampharos, hounddoom, Malamar, rayquaza

tweets.text: When asked about the $2.2B he personally raked in last year while President, Trump replied, “Everybody is profiting.” Trump made $1.4B in crypto alone, but most of the people who bought tokens or meme coins he sold lost money. Maybe he meant everybody named Trump is profiting.

tweets.text:
Ethereum Institutional @ethereuminsti will play a central and key role as a neutral entity bringing institutional adoption to ethereum ethereum:native 

In their words…
“What’s been missing for Ethereum to date is a neutral counterpart on the other side of the table: a guide that convenes the full ecosystem around shared standards, connects institutions within the ecosystem to solutions / infrastructure providers and applications, and removes integration friction, from first pilot through scaled production.”

Bitmine @BitMNR is glad to support this effort $BMNR
